mainEntity.name: What if AI misquotes your Seattle firm's content?
mainEntity.text: What if AI misquotes your Seattle firm's content?

acceptedAnswer.text: Correct via original source updates, digital PR outreach to AI providers, and authoritative rebuttals.

suggestedAnswer.text: Seattle: Monitor daily, issue corrections publicly. Use schema for context. Legal risk low if source accurate; boosts E-E-A-T long-term.

name: Handling AI Misquotes for Seattle Firms
description: Correct via original source updates, digital PR outreach to AI providers, and authoritative rebuttals.
